title: AN ACT REAPPORTIONING THE PROVINCE OF BUKIDNON INTO FOUR (4) LEGISLATIVE DISTRICTS

chunks.text:
SEC. 2.

Incumbent Representatives.

â The incumbent Representatives of the Province of Bukidnon shall continue to represent their respective districts until the new Representatives shall have been elected and qualified.

SEC. 3.

Rules and Regulations.

â The Commission on Elections shall issue the necessary rules and regulations to implement this Act.

SEC. 4.

Repealing Clause.

â All laws, rules and regulations which are inconsistent with this Act are hereby repealed, amended or modified accordingly.

SEC 5.

Effectivity.

â This Act shall take effect fifteen (15) days after its publication in at least two (2) newspapers of general circulation.

Approved,

(Sgd.) JUAN PONCE ENRILE

President of the Senate

(Sgd.)

FELICIANO BELMONTE JR.

Speaker of the House

of Representatives

This Act which originated in the House of Representatives was finally passed by the House of Representatives and the Senate on October 3, 2011 and September 20, 2012, respectively.

(Sgd.) EMMA LIRIO-REYES

Secretary of the Senate

(Sgd.) MARILYN B. BARUA-YAP

Secretary General

House of Representatives

Approved:

SEP 28 2012

(Sgd.) BENIGNO S. AQUINO III

President of the Philippines
